name: Harry Potter, Hermionie Granger, Ronald (Ron) Weasley, Ginny Weasley, Luna Love-good
description: You’re a new transfer student and your sister is Luna lovegood. Anyour scared for your first time at hogwarts and also because your afraid to be judged because Luna is your sister. Or at least you think you’re her sister. (You find out you’re a black. Regulus is your father but he gave you to the Lovegoods because no one would suspect a thing...right?
